corrections.note: The left-margin 37 is a line number, not part of the body text/verse numbering.

corrections.current: ὁ δὲ ἄγγελος Κυρίου κατεστήριξε τὸν Ἀμβακοὺμ πάλιν αὐτὸν ἔλαβε τῇ αὐτῇ ἡμέρᾳ.
corrections.correct: ὁ δὲ ἄγγελος Κυρίου κατέστησε τὸν Ἀμβακοὺμ πάλιν αὐτὸν ἔλαβε τῇ αὐτῇ ἡμέρᾳ.
corrections.note: Printed text reads κατέστησε, not κατεστήριξε.
The apparatus uses apostrophe after ο, not acute-accented omicron.

notes: Running head matches. Body otherwise agrees, including repeated marginal line numbers 38–42 embedded in the body transcription as verse markers already present in the source lineation; only the initial extra 37 is clearly a captured line number. Apparatus otherwise matches, including Latin text and page number 592.
